# Reels Development Guidelines

Auto-generated from all feature plans. Last updated: 2026-03-29

## Active Technologies
- PostgreSQL (Supabase-hosted) · Supabase Storage (profile photos, posters) · iOS SwiftData (offline cache) (001-reels-platform-mvp)

- TypeScript 5.x (strict mode, all web packages) · Swift 5.9+ (iOS) + Next.js 14 (App Router) · tRPC v11 · Prisma ORM · BetterAuth · Tailwind CSS · Turborepo · SwiftUI · Cheerio (scraping) · TMDB API (film metadata) (001-reels-platform-mvp)

## Project Structure

```text
backend/
frontend/
tests/
```

## Commands

npm test && npm run lint

## Code Style

TypeScript 5.x (strict mode, all web packages) · Swift 5.9+ (iOS): Follow standard conventions
